steps.text: Welcome to the fruit shop! Fruits grow on plants and trees — they're sweet and full of goodness. Find the apple!
steps.feedback: Apples grow on trees — they can be red or green! Now find the banana!
Bananas grow in hot countries on big plants. Now find the strawberry!
Strawberries are red and grow close to the ground. Now find the orange!
Oranges are juicy and full of vitamin C. Last one — find the pear!
Pears are shaped like a teardrop. The fruit shop is sorted!
